changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.onFailMessage: practice_finding columns already renamed to final names

changeSet.comment: Rename pre-existing practice_finding columns to final names: target_type→artifact_type, target_id→artifact_id, contributor_id→about_user_id.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Re-point the pre-existing practice_finding contributor FK to fk_observation_subject (about_user_id → user.id).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_practice_finding_contributor

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop the obsolete contributor/developer-detected index (actor-free model).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Drop practice.category (removed from the PracticeArea/Practice model; no constraint/index depends on it).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals

preConditions.onFailMessage: practice_finding artifact_type CHECK already admits ISSUE
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_practice_finding_target_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%ISSUE%'

changeSet.comment: Widen the practice_finding artifact_type CHECK to admit ISSUE findings.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.onFailMessage: practice_finding verdict already remapped to presence

changeSet.comment: Remap verdict values to presence (POSITIVE/OBSERVED→PRESENT, NEGATIVE/NOT_OBSERVED→ABSENT) and re-point the CHECK.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename reception table finding_feedback → reaction (it is a reaction to delivered feedback).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'finding_feedback_pkey'

changeSet.comment: Rename pre-existing finding_feedback constraints/indexes to reaction_*; drop the finding-anchored ones (table is re-anchored to feedback below).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename reaction.contributor_id→reactor_user_id (pre-existing column).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename the reaction reactor FK + reactor-timeline index to final names.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE reaction RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_finding_feedback_contributor TO fk_reaction_reactor;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE reaction RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_reactor TO fk_finding_feedback_contributor;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Re-map removed credential_mode 'OAUTH' to 'API_KEY' so persisted rows still deserialize.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE agent_config SET credential_mode = 'API_KEY' WHERE credential_mode = 'OAUTH';

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: AI runtime bindings + per-workspace practice-review policy (all nullable = inherit fleet default).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Bound practice-detection config FK; SET NULL on delete so a removed config degrades to fan-out.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Bound mentor config FK; SET NULL on delete so a removed config degrades to oldest-enabled fallback.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Index the FK columns. Postgres does not auto-index referencing columns, so both the ON DELETE SET NULL action and the delete-guard exists-query would otherwise seq-scan workspace on every agent_config delete. Partial (most workspaces inherit = NULL).
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ix_workspace_practice_config ON workspace (practice_config_id) WHERE practice_config_id IS NOT NULL; CREATE INDEX ix_workspace_mentor_config ON workspace (mentor_config_id) WHERE mentor_config_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Workspace-scoped practice areas (configurable learning-objective grouping over practices).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Slug unique per workspace; the stable key survives a name rename.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Surface "observations under active areas" per workspace.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Tenancy FK. No DB cascade — the workspace purge contributor removes areas explicitly (mirrors fk_practice_workspace).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: 1:N binding column (NULL = ungrouped).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: practice → practice_area. ON DELETE SET NULL: deleting an area unbinds (never deletes) its practices.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Index the area FK: area-scoped dashboard reads join observation→practice→area.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Artifact discriminator on practice (PULL_REQUEST | ISSUE), column applies_to; defaults to PULL_REQUEST.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Transient: practice.polarity (valence source for the observation assessment backfill); defaults to DESIRABLE; dropped after backfill.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: B: developer-facing learner columns (nullable; surfaced only via LearnerPracticeDTO, never with criteria).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021/0022: cross-run observation identity (stable hash; never line/jobId). Nullable, backfill-free.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Index the cross-run recurrence key (supersession lookups) + about_user_id (subject dashboards).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: A1 trend: composite index for per-target run ranking (ObservationTrendService).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: synthesized feedback unit (one composed lesson; replaces rather than re-posts). baseline_state DERIVED on read, not a column.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: One feedback unit per (agent_job, position).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_state'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECKs for feedback at final allowed-lists (channel column; source column).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.agent_job_id to agent_job.id. CASCADE: purging a job removes its synthesized feedback.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Tenancy FK feedback.workspace_id to workspace.id. No DB cascade; workspace purge removes feedback explicitly.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.recipient_user_id to user.id. RESTRICT (no onDelete): feedback blocks deleting its recipient.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.subject_user_id to user.id (person the feedback is ABOUT). RESTRICT (no onDelete): about_user_id is NOT NULL, so a delete must be blocked, not nulled.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Self-FK feedback.replaces_id to feedback.id (continuity chain). SET NULL on delete.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Query indexes: agent_job + workspace + replaces/recipient FKs, recipient-timeline, target lookup, thread_key continuity.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='feedback' AND column_name='subject_user_id'

changeSet.comment: C: feedback.subject_user_id NOT NULL (backfill = recipient).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback SET subject_user_id = recipient_user_id WHERE subject_user_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: ADR 0022 §5: feedback.subject_user_id -> about_user_id.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: M:N binding of a feedback unit to the observations it was composed from. Composite PK (feedback_id, observation_id).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_observation_role'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECK for feedback_observation.role (PRIMARY | SUPPORTING).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback_observation ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_observation_role CHECK (role IN ('PRIMARY', 'SUPPORTING'));
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE feedback_observation DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_feedback_observation_role;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_observation.feedback_id to feedback.id, CASCADE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Reverse-lookup index (observation → feedback units it fed) + covers the observation FK ON DELETE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: one concrete placement of a feedback unit on a surface (summary / inline anchor / conversation turn).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_placement_placement'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECKs for feedback_placement (placement_type / anchor_kind / anchor_side).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_placement.feedback_id to feedback.id, CASCADE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Indexes: feedback_id (placements-of-a-unit + FK ON DELETE) and posted_comment_ref (reconcile a posted comment/note back to its placement).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop the dead feedback_post table (0 writers; superseded by the C6 feedback ledger).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: practice_revision — append-only criteria snapshots (SCD-2).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: unique(practice_id, revision_number) + index + FK to practice (CASCADE).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A backfill: revision 1 (criteria-as-it-is) for every existing practice.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO practice_revision (practice_id, revision_number, criteria, created_at) SELECT id, 1, criteria, now() FROM practice;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: practice_finding.practice_revision_id (nullable) + FK SET NULL — pins an observation to the criteria it fired against. FK name lands final (fk_observation_revision).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop practice_finding.guidance — advice now lives on the delivered Feedback (ADR 0021).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS guidance;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Area-visual feature (NOT ADR 0022): add practice_area.icon + practice_area.color (presentation-only, nullable).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename practice_finding → observation.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename pre-existing observation columns idempotency_key→occurrence_key, detected_at→observed_at.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename the pre-existing unique constraint + the pre-existing detected indexes to observation_* names.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE observation DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS uk_practice_finding_idempotency

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Re-point observation.practice_id FK to fk_observation_practice.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE observation DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_practice_finding_practice

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename observation.verdict→presence and chk_practice_finding_verdict→chk_observation_presence.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE observation RENAME CONSTRAINT chk_practice_finding_verdict TO chk_observation_presence

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE observation RENAME CONSTRAINT chk_observation_presence TO chk_practice_finding_verdict

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Add observation.assessment, backfilled from practice.polarity × presence (DESIRABLE+PRESENT/UNDESIRABLE+ABSENT⇒GOOD; DESIRABLE+ABSENT/UNDESIRABLE+PRESENT⇒BAD; NOT_APPLICABLE⇒NULL).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE observation o SET assessment = 'GOOD' FROM practice p WHERE o.practice_id = p.id AND o.presence = 'PRESENT' AND p.polarity = 'DESIRABLE';
UPDATE observation o SET assessment = 'BAD' FROM practice p WHERE o.practice_id = p.id AND o.presence = 'ABSENT' AND p.polarity = 'DESIRABLE';
UPDATE observation o SET assessment = 'BAD' FROM practice p WHERE o.practice_id = p.id AND o.presence = 'PRESENT' AND p.polarity = 'UNDESIRABLE';
UPDATE observation o SET assessment = 'GOOD' FROM practice p WHERE o.practice_id = p.id AND o.presence = 'ABSENT' AND p.polarity = 'UNDESIRABLE';

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_observation_assessment'

changeSet.comment: CHECK constraints for observation.assessment (GOOD|BAD|NULL) + presence/assessment coherence (assessment NULL iff presence=NOT_APPLICABLE).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE observation ADD CONSTRAINT chk_observation_assessment CHECK (assessment IS NULL OR assessment IN ('GOOD', 'BAD')); ALTER TABLE observation ADD CONSTRAINT chk_observation_presence_assessment CHECK ((presence = 'NOT_APPLICABLE' AND assessment IS NULL) OR (presence IN ('PRESENT', 'ABSENT') AND assessment IS NOT NULL));
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE observation DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_observation_presence_assessment; ALTER TABLE observation DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_observation_assessment;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: observation.severity becomes nullable (band only for a BAD observation).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_observation.observation_id to observation.id, CASCADE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Re-anchor reaction to feedback: drop finding_id + its FK, add feedback_id NOT NULL FK + recurrence_key + indexes; remap action APPLIED→ADDRESSED.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE reaction DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_finding_feedback_finding

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE reaction DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_reaction_action; ALTER TABLE reaction ADD CONSTRAINT chk_reaction_action CHECK (action IN ('APPLIED', 'DISPUTED', 'NOT_APPLICABLE'));

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop the transient practice.polarity backfill scaffolding.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'practice_finding_pkey'

changeSet.comment: Rename the leaked practice_finding_* constraint names on observation to observation_* (pkey + confidence/severity/target_type CHECKs).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.onFailMessage: feedback channel/source CHECKs not present to re-align

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_channel'
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_source'

changeSet.comment: Re-align chk_feedback_channel (PROFILE not REFLECTION_DASHBOARD) and chk_feedback_source (AGENT only) with the current enums.
